name: Balco Group AB
summary: Balco Group AB develops, produces, and sells balcony systems to tenant-owner associations, private landlords, and public housing and construction companies in Sweden, Norway, Denmark, Germany, Finland, the United Kingdom, and the Netherlands. The company operates in two segments, Renovation and New Build. It offers glazed balconies, including climate walls, access and etage balconies; open balconies, such as steel and aluminium, city, maritime, and prefabricated balconies; and accessories and other products comprising flooring products, screens, glass corners, powered awnings, sunscreens, roller blinds, and window boxes. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in V√É¬§xj√É¬∂, Sweden.
